caption: A man with a shaved head, a full beard, and tattoos on his right arm is recorded in a studio setting against a dark, vertically ribbed acoustic foam wall. He wears black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt. He sits behind a professional microphone mounted on a silver boom arm, which features the legible text "Rode PSA1". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his right hand. He initially raises his hand toward his face with his palm open, then moves his hand slightly to the right, momentarily closing his eyes as he continues to speak. In the final moment, he extends his arm further outward and away from his body, his hand remaining open as he maintains an expressive facial expression while talking into the microphone.
